final:
// // This module implements a 2-to-1 multiplexer where the output is in1 when sel is high and in2 when sel is low.
module top_module(
  input in1,
  input in2,
  input sel,
  output reg out
);always @(*) begin
  if (sel == 0) begin
    out = in1;
  end else begin
    out = in2;
  end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 2-to-1 multiplexer where the output is in1 when sel is high and in2 when sel is low.
